description: Target-neutral test manifest for legacy OpenEMR now and modernized OpenEMR later.

plans.name: Slice 1 Readiness
plans.description: Read-only patient-search/chart-summary confidence plan for both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 2 Scheduling Readiness
plans.description: Read-only scheduling confidence plan for a future appointment list/detail workflow on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 3 Encounters Readiness
plans.description: Read-only encounter confidence plan for SOAP and vitals detail behavior on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 4 Clinical Lists Readiness
plans.description: Read-only clinical lists confidence plan for problems, allergies, medication list entries, and prescriptions on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 5 Messaging Readiness
plans.description: Read-only messaging confidence plan for portal-enabled patients and patient messages on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 6 Procedures Readiness
plans.description: Read-only procedure results confidence plan for completed lab order, report, and final result behavior on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 7 Billing Readiness
plans.description: Read-only fee sheet confidence plan for seeded encounter billing lines on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 8 Admin Readiness
plans.description: Read-only administration directory confidence plan for seeded users and facilities on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 9 Reports Readiness
plans.description: Read-only operational reporting confidence plan for gold-data activity, provider, facility, and clinical-condition summaries on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 10 Contact Mutation Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable patient contact confidence plan that updates, renders, and restores the same anchor patient on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 11 Appointment Mutation Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable scheduling confidence plan that creates, cancels, renders, and removes a future appointment on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 12 Encounter Mutation Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable encounter confidence plan that creates, updates, renders, and removes an encounter with vitals and SOAP details on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 13 Clinical List Mutation Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable clinical-list confidence plan that creates, renders, deactivates, and removes an allergy list entry on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 14 Message Mutation Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable patient-message confidence plan that creates, renders, closes, soft-deletes, and removes a patient message on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 15 Prescription Mutation Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable prescription confidence plan that creates, renders, deactivates, and removes a prescription on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 16 Billing Mutation Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable fee-sheet confidence plan that creates, renders, marks billed, deactivates, and removes a CPT billing line on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 17 Procedure Mutation Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable lab procedure confidence plan that creates, completes, reports, renders, and removes a procedure order/result workflow on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 18 Admin Facility Mutation Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable administration confidence plan that creates, updates, renders, deactivates, and removes a facility on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 19 Admin User Mutation Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable administration confidence plan that creates, updates, renders, deactivates, and removes a user on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 20 Access Control Readiness
plans.description: Read-only administration security confidence plan that compares default ACL groups, permission objects, and group-permission assignments on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 21 Access Permission Mutation Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable administration security confidence plan that revokes, renders, restores, and verifies a focused ACL group-permission assignment on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 22 User Group Membership Mutation Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable administration security confidence plan that creates a user, assigns access group membership, renders it, revokes it, and cleans up on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 23 Pending Procedure Orders Readiness
plans.description: Read-only lab procedure confidence plan that verifies future scheduled, reportless procedure orders on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 24 Reports Export Readiness
plans.description: Read-only operational reporting export confidence plan that verifies normalized report export rows and visible CSV export affordances on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 25 Documents Readiness
plans.description: Read-only patient document confidence plan that verifies filed document metadata, categories, encounter links, and visible document list behavior on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 26 Document Mutation Readiness
plans.description: Patient document mutation confidence plan that creates, renders, soft-deletes, and removes a database-backed text document on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 27 Document Content Readiness
plans.description: Read-only patient document content confidence plan that verifies full stored document payloads and modernized viewer/download retrieval for the shared gold-data anchor.

plans.name: Slice 28 Insurance Readiness
plans.description: Read-only insurance coverage confidence plan that verifies primary and secondary coverage facts and chart visibility for the shared gold-data anchor.

plans.name: Slice 29 Immunizations Readiness
plans.description: Read-only immunization confidence plan that verifies rich vaccine history facts and chart visibility for the shared pediatric gold-data anchor.

plans.name: Slice 30 Immunization Mutation Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable immunization confidence plan that creates, renders, marks entered in error, and removes an immunization on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 31 Problem Mutation Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable problem-list confidence plan that creates, renders, deactivates, and removes a medical problem on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 32 Medication List Mutation Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable medication-list confidence plan that creates, renders, deactivates, and removes a medication list entry on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 33 Binary Patient Document Mutation Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable binary patient-document confidence plan that creates, renders, downloads, archives, and removes a PDF-style document on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 34 Insurance Mutation Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable patient insurance confidence plan that creates, renders, updates, and removes a coverage row on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 35 Encounter Metadata Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable encounter metadata confidence plan that creates, renders, updates, and removes referral, sensitivity, external ID, and POS metadata on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 36 Patient Demographics Mutation Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable patient demographics confidence plan that updates, renders, and restores identity, address, marital-status, and occupation details on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 37 Patient Registration Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable patient registration confidence plan that creates, renders, and removes a temporary patient record on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 38 Document Sign-Off Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable patient document sign-off confidence plan that creates, approves, renders, archives, and removes a reviewed document on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 39 Document External Link Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable patient document external-link confidence plan that creates, renders, archives, and removes a web-url document on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 40 Document Denial Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable patient document review confidence plan that creates, denies, renders, archives, and removes a reviewed document on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 41 Document Metadata Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable patient document metadata confidence plan that creates, refiles, renders, archives, and removes a patient document on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 42 Document Archive Restore Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable patient document archive confidence plan that creates, archives, restores, renders, and removes a patient document on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 43 Document Content Replacement Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable patient document content replacement plan that creates, replaces, renders, archives, and removes a text document on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 44 Billing Diagnosis Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable fee-sheet diagnosis coding plan that creates, renders, deactivates, and removes an ICD10 diagnosis line on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Legacy Readiness
plans.description: Read-only baseline confidence plan for the currently seeded legacy application.

plans.name: Isolated Workflow Mutations
plans.description: Mutation-heavy workflow plan that reseeds before every test for strongest isolation.

plans.name: Full Parity Contract
plans.description: Complete parity plan for every implemented workflow suite. Modernized target joins this plan after mutation-capable workflow slices exist.

resetModes.description: Do not reset the target database before running tests.
Reset once before the selected test run.
Reset before each individual test. Slowest, but strongest isolation for mutation tests.

suites.name: Patient Search And Chart Summary
suites.description: Compares the first modernized read-only slice against the legacy baseline using the shared anchor patient.

suites.name: Scheduling Appointment Detail
suites.description: Compares the read-only future appointment detail workflow against the legacy scheduler using a shared gold-data anchor.

suites.name: Encounter Clinical Detail
suites.description: Compares the read-only encounter SOAP and vitals detail workflow against the legacy encounter UI using a shared gold-data anchor.

suites.name: Clinical Lists And Medications
suites.description: Compares read-only problems, allergies, medication list entries, and prescriptions against the legacy chart using a shared gold-data anchor.

suites.name: Patient Messages And Portal Flags
suites.description: Compares read-only portal-enabled patient message behavior against the legacy chart using a shared gold-data anchor.

suites.name: Procedure Results
suites.description: Compares completed lab procedure order, report, and final result rendering against the legacy procedure results screen using a shared gold-data anchor.

suites.name: Pending Scheduled Procedure Orders
suites.description: Compares future scheduled procedure orders with no report rows against the legacy procedure results screen using a shared gold-data anchor.

suites.name: Fee Sheet Billing
suites.description: Compares read-only encounter fee sheet billing lines against the legacy fee sheet using a shared gold-data anchor.

suites.name: Administration Directory
suites.description: Compares read-only users and facilities directory behavior against the legacy administration screens using shared gold-data anchors.

suites.name: Operational Reports
suites.description: Compares read-only operational reporting facts and report surfaces against legacy report screens using the shared gold dataset.

suites.name: Operational Reports Export
suites.description: Compares normalized operational report export rows and browser-visible CSV export affordances against the legacy report-export behavior.

suites.name: Patient Documents
suites.description: Compares read-only patient document metadata and document-list rendering against the legacy patient Documents screen using a shared gold-data anchor.

suites.name: Patient Document Content
suites.description: Compares full stored patient document payloads and validates modernized viewer/download retrieval for the shared gold-data anchor.

suites.name: Patient Insurance Coverage
suites.description: Compares primary and secondary insurance coverage facts and chart rendering against the legacy demographics screen using a shared gold-data anchor.

suites.name: Patient Immunizations
suites.description: Compares pediatric immunization history facts and rendering against the legacy Immunizations screen using a shared gold-data anchor.

suites.name: Administration Access Control
suites.description: Compares read-only ACL groups, permission objects, and default group-permission assignments against the legacy Access Control administration surface.

suites.name: Gold Database Contract
suites.description: Validates the seeded gold dataset through normalized database probes.

suites.name: HTTP Functional Contract
suites.description: Validates health, login form, and server-rendered app shell behavior.

suites.name: Playwright UI Contract
suites.description: Exercises browser-visible login, chart, encounter, scheduling, billing, lab result, reports, and administration workflows.

suites.name: Workflow Mutation Contract
suites.description: Exercises deterministic CRUD-style workflows with pre/post probes and cleanup.

suites.name: Patient Contact Mutation
suites.description: Updates, verifies, renders, and restores patient contact data through the same anchor-patient workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Patient Demographics Mutation
suites.description: Updates, verifies, renders, and restores patient identity, address, marital-status, and occupation details through the same chart workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Patient Registration Mutation
suites.description: Creates, verifies, renders, and removes a temporary registered patient through the same patient chart workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Appointment Mutation
suites.description: Creates, cancels, renders, and removes a future appointment through the same scheduling workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Encounter Mutation
suites.description: Creates, updates, renders, and removes an encounter with vitals and SOAP details through the same clinical workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Encounter Metadata Mutation
suites.description: Creates, renders, updates, and removes encounter sensitivity, referral source, external ID, and POS metadata through the same clinical workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Clinical List Allergy Mutation
suites.description: Creates, renders, deactivates, and removes an allergy list entry through the same clinical-list workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Problem List Mutation
suites.description: Creates, renders, deactivates, and removes a medical problem through the same clinical-list workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Medication List Mutation
suites.description: Creates, renders, deactivates, and removes a medication list entry through the same clinical-list workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Patient Message Mutation
suites.description: Creates, closes, renders, soft-deletes, and removes a patient message through the same pnotes workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Patient Document Mutation
suites.description: Creates, renders, soft-deletes, and removes a database-backed patient document through the same patient-file workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Binary Patient Document Mutation
suites.description: Creates, renders, downloads, archives, and removes a PDF-style binary patient document through the same patient-file workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Patient Document Sign-Off Mutation
suites.description: Creates, approves, renders, archives, and removes a reviewed patient document through the same patient-file workflow on both targets.

suites.name: External-Link Patient Document Mutation
suites.description: Creates, renders, archives, and removes a web-url patient document through the same patient-file workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Patient Document Denial Mutation
suites.description: Creates, denies, renders, archives, and removes a reviewed patient document through the same patient-file workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Patient Document Metadata Mutation
suites.description: Creates, refiles, renders, archives, and removes a patient document through the same patient-file metadata workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Patient Document Archive Restore Mutation
suites.description: Creates, archives, restores, renders, and removes a patient document through the same patient-file archive workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Patient Document Content Replacement Mutation
suites.description: Creates, replaces, renders, archives, and removes a text patient document payload through the same patient-file workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Patient Insurance Mutation
suites.description: Creates, renders, updates, and removes an insurance coverage row through the same patient chart workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Prescription Mutation
suites.description: Creates, renders, deactivates, and removes a prescription through the same medication workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Immunization Mutation
suites.description: Creates, renders, marks entered in error, and removes an immunization through the same immunization workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Billing Line Mutation
suites.description: Creates, renders, marks billed, deactivates, and removes a CPT billing line through the same fee-sheet workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Billing Diagnosis Line Mutation
suites.description: Creates, renders, deactivates, and removes an ICD10 diagnosis line through the same fee-sheet workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Procedure Order Mutation
suites.description: Creates, completes, reports, renders, and removes a lab procedure order/result through the same procedure-results workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Administration Facility Mutation
suites.description: Creates, updates, renders, deactivates, and removes a facility through the same administration workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Administration User Mutation
suites.description: Creates, updates, renders, deactivates, and removes a user through the same administration workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Administration Access Permission Mutation
suites.description: Revokes, renders, restores, and verifies a focused ACL group-permission assignment through the same administration workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Administration User Group Membership Mutation
suites.description: Creates a user, assigns access group membership, renders it, revokes it, and removes the temporary user through the same administration workflow on both targets.
